Why SWK Solutions

Built around the syllabus, taught by specialists.

Every subject is led by a teacher who specialises in that Cambridge syllabus — not a generalist covering multiple subjects. That focus shows up in results.

1

Subject specialists

Dedicated O and A Level teachers for Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Maths, Add Maths, Computer Science, Economics, Business, Accounting and more.

2

Exam-board aligned

Curriculum, past papers and workshop content built directly around Cambridge Assessment International Education syllabi and grade thresholds.

3

Four campuses + online

Choose the campus nearest you — Gulshan, Jauhar, North Nazimabad or Bahadurabad — or join live online classes from anywhere.

4

Intensive workshops

Subject-specific revision workshops (like our 10-day O Level Physics 5054 workshop) ahead of major exam series.

Programmes

O Level & A Level coaching, subject by subject.

Regular term groups plus intensive pre-exam workshops, run across all four campuses and online.

O Level Sciences

Physics, Chemistry and Biology — concept-first teaching with topical past-paper practice.

Physics 5054ChemistryBiology

A Level Sciences

A Level Physics, Chemistry and Biology with structured past-paper and exam-technique sessions.

A Level PhysicsChemistryBiology

Mathematics & Add Maths

O and A Level Maths plus Additional Mathematics, taught with a strong problem-solving foundation.

O/A Level MathsAdd Maths

Business & Economics

Business Studies, Economics and Accounting for both O and A Level, with case-study and theory grading practice.

BusinessEconomicsAccounting

Languages & Humanities

English, Urdu, Pak Studies, Islamiyat and Sociology & Psychology, taught for clarity and exam structure.

EnglishUrduPak StudiesIslamiyat

Computer Science

O and A Level Computer Science — theory, algorithms and practical programming components.

O Level ComputingA Level Computing
